items.author: Zara Zhang
items.role: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: YouTube:
items.title: 用消息方式把待办交给AI自动执行
items.summary: 作者将待办事项直接通过消息发给 OpenClaw，AI 不仅记录任务还会自动执行，每天早上发送已完成任务报告并高亮需关注的事项。作者认为这可能是一个真正有效的待办管理系统。
items.whyItMatters: 这是一种从'记录待办'到'AI自动执行'的 workflow 转变——把任务甩给 AI 处理，而非传统的主动查看列表。对于个人任务管理有参考意义。
items.translatedText: 刚刚和 OpenClaw 有一个顿悟时刻。我用「向 OpenClaw 大脑dump待办」替代了我的 to-do list。每次想到一个快速任务，我就直接发消息给 OpenClaw。它不仅会记录这些任务，还会真正去执行这些任务。每天早上它会给我发送一份已完成任务的报告，并高亮那些需要我关注的任务。这可能真的会是一个有效的待办管理系统。
items.originalText: Just had an aha moment with OpenClaw. I'm replacing my to-do list with "braindumping to-dos to OpenClaw". Whenever I think of a quick task, I just message it to OpenClaw Not only will it record those tasks, but it will actually DO those tasks Every morning it sends me a report of what tasks are already done, and highlights the ones that need my attention This might actually be a to-do management system that works

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.role: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster…
items.title: 我从不使用 Codex 的计划模式
items.summary: 作者表示他从来不使用计划模式，解释该功能是为了帮助那些难以改变原有习惯的用户，并建议直接与 agent 对话即可。
items.whyItMatters: 反映了 AI 编程工具在设计上面向不同用户群体的考量，计划模式更多是降低使用门槛而非必须步骤，熟练用户可以直接对话完成任务。
items.translatedText: 我从来不用计划模式。这个功能之所以被添加到 Codex，主要是为了帮助那些"claude-pilled"（深受 Claude 影响）但难以改变原有习惯的人。你直接和你的 agent 对话就行了。
items.originalText: I never use plan mode. The main reason this was added to codex is for claude-pilled people who struggle with changing their habits. just talk with your agent.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.title: Vercel注册月增长达52%，连续加速
items.summary: Vercel月度注册增长率升至52%，较上月的23%翻倍增长，再前一个月为17%，呈现明显加速态势
items.whyItMatters: Vercel是AI应用部署的主流平台之一，其用户增长加速反映了AI开发工作流的活跃程度，对开发者选择平台具有参考价值
items.translatedText: Vercel月注册增长率达到52%（环比从23%上升，再前为17%）
items.originalText: Vercel signups are growing at 52% MoM (up from 23%, up from 17%)

items.translatedText: If you're a PM or on sales or support, how many times have you needed to bother an engineer to find out exactly how the app works? I wanted to know exactly what the default setting was for a personal configuration for all of our users. You never need to ask an engineer again for this kind of thing, because Linear Agent can just read the code and tell you.

I wanted to know exactly what the default setting was for a personal configuration for all of our users. You never need to ask an engineer again for this kind of thing, because Linear Agent can just read the code and tell you.

items.author: Amjad Masad
items.title: Replit Agent 4 将平台定位为可定制操作系统
items.summary: Replit 发布 Agent 4，该智能体使平台具备类似操作系统的能力，用户可通过 skills 功能对平台进行无限定制。
items.whyItMatters: 这是 AI 开发平台向操作系统演化的一个信号，对关注 AI agent 工作流和开发工具演进的从业者有参考价值。
items.translatedText: Agent 4 让 Replit 变成了某种操作系统。你可以用 skills 无限定制这个平台。
items.originalText: Agent 4 made Replit into an OS of sorts. You can endlessly customize the platform with skills.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.role: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: YouTube:
items.title: 推出Follow builders技能帮助追踪AI资讯
items.summary: 作者介绍了自己创建的Follow builders技能，精选25个来自OpenAI、Anthropic、Google等公司的AI builder账号和播客，可通过agent整合发送个性化每日通讯，GitHub上已获2000+ stars。
items.whyItMatters: 为AI从业者提供了一个经过筛选的高质量信息源聚合方案，解决了信息过载和筛选成本高的问题。
items.translatedText: 推出"Follow builders"技能：这是掌握AI领域惊人动态的最佳方式。我精心挑选了25个X账号和播客，它们分享来自OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、OpenClaw、Replit、Vercel、Cursor等公司builder的最高质量、第一手AI见解。你的OpenClaw/agent可以整合我的核心信息源，并根据你的偏好通过任意渠道发送个性化每日通讯。该工具已在GitHub上广泛使用，获得2000+ stars；链接如下。
items.originalText: Introducing the "Follow builders" skill: the best way to stay on top of the insane happenings in AI I carefully curated 25 X accounts & podcasts that share the highest-quality, first-hand insights on AI (by builders from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, OpenClaw, Replit, Vercel, Cursor...) Your OpenClaw/agent can remix my central feed & send you a personalized daily newsletter in whatever channel you like Already widely used with 2k+ stars on GitHub; link below

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.role: ceo @every   the only subscription you need to stay at the edge of AI
items.title: Linear的agent-native转型经验
items.summary: Dan Shipper认为SaaS并未消亡，只是需要成为agent-native。他以Linear为例说明：Linear没有盲目跟风推出chatbot，而是坚持帮助团队开发软件的核心使命，将用户群体从人类扩展到agents，使Coinbase、Brex等公司能够在Linear中管理agents的工作。
items.whyItMatters: 这条内容提供了SaaS如何成功转型的具体案例。Linear的经验表明：不追逐热点、坚守产品使命、让agents成为一级用户，是应对AI时代的有效策略。对其他SaaS公司有参考价值。
items.translatedText: SaaS并未消亡，只是需要成为agent-native。Linear是一个很好的例子：他们将产品 pivot 成人类和agents都能使用的方式，这使他们成为agent-native时代最顶尖的软件工具之一。
items.originalText: SaaS isn’t dead, it just needs to become agent-native. Linear (@linear) is a great example of how: They pivoted the product to be used by both humans and agents, and that has made them one of the premier software tools in the agent-native era. I had Linear’s cofounder and CEO @karrisaarinen on @every's AI & I to talk about how a product management tool for human software developers became an agent-native tool—and how Linear’s trajectory reveals a bright future for SaaS businesses: - Speed means decisions matter more, not less. AI makes it easy to have an idea and build it without considering whether its existence is justified. When ChatGPT was released, SaaS companies were launching their own chatbots left, right, and center. Instead of jumping on the bandwagon, Linear stopped to consider whether the application was useful. (It wasn’t.) - Just because the technology has changed doesn’t mean your mission should. Karri attributes Linear’s success to never losing sight of what matters: helping teams develop great software. Instead of chasing trends, Linear focused on understanding how AI was impacting its customers’ workflows—and updating its product accordingly. - Agents are now first-class users. Linear never tried to change what it was or did well; it just expanded the user base. Companies can now kick off agents inside Linear, manage them, and track what they're working on alongside the humans on the team, which explains why Codex, Coinbase, and Brex all run their agents on Linear. This is a must watch for anyone interested in how an agent-native SaaS company operates. Watch below! Timestamps: Introduction and how Every first discovered Linear: 00:00:39 Why Linear waited to ship AI features instead of rushing to chatbots: 00:02:00 Linear's agent platform and becoming the system that guides AI agents: 00:05:06 Why "SaaS is dead" is a simplistic narrative: 00:07:42 How Linear adopted AI coding tools internally: 00:12:18 AI's impact on product building workflows—speed versus thoughtfulness: 00:17:45 The value of conceptual work and thinking before shipping: 00:22:18 How AI is reshaping Linear's product strategy: 00:29:30 Demo: Linear's agent skills, shared context, and code review workflow: 00:37:18 The future of product development and the enduring role of human judgment: 00:47:48

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.role: ceo @every   the only subscription you need to stay at the edge of AI
items.title: Notion 适合 AI 时代
items.summary: Dan Shipper 表示从 2018 年接触 Notion 2.0 以来一直是粉丝和高级用户，认为 Notion 天然适配 AI 时代，与 Notion 合作很愉快。
items.whyItMatters: 作为 AI 产品公司 CEO，Dan Shipper 对 Notion 的认可可能影响其他 AI 产品团队对笔记工具的选择，Notion 在 AI 工具链中的定位获得开发者社区的积极反馈。
items.translatedText: 技术上这次活动是 Notion 赞助的，但从 2018 年我遇到 Ivan Zhao 他给我看了 Notion 2.0 以来，我一直是一个粉丝和高级用户。说实话，我觉得 Notion 就是为 AI 这个时刻而生的——很荣幸能和他们合作。
items.originalText: @every @NotionHQ technically this camp is sponsored by Notion but ive been a fan and power user since i met @ivanhzhao in 2018 and he showed me Notion 2.0 tbh i feel like notion was made for this moment in AI—a pleasure for us to work with them
